positive: A whimsical forest scene featuring stylized, low-polygon anthropomorphic forest animals (e.g., fox, owl, rabbit, bear) gathered in a harmonious circle. The animals are rendered in a cohesive, modern storybook illustration style, utilizing bold, clean silhouettes and vibrant, yet earthy color palettes (sage green, burnt orange, dusty blue). The composition is centered, designed for seamless repeat or single graphic apparel print, with strong contrast provided by deep shadows under the trees and a bright, diffused background light. The focus should be on clean lines and flat areas of color, evoking a sense of playful, joyful gathering. Vectors, digital illustration, clean graphic design, high contrast, rule of thirds composition.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic, photorealistic, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyrighted, messy, low quality
